book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. LUKE

verses.text: In the mean time, when there were gathered together an innumerable multitude of people, insomuch that they trode one upon another, he began to say unto his disciples first of all, \+w Beware\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the leaven\+w* \+w of the Pharisees\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w hypocrisy\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w there is\+w* \+w nothing\+w* \+w covered\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be revealed\+w*; \+w neither\+w* \+w hid\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be known\+w*.

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w ye have spoken\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w darkness\+w* \+w shall be heard\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the light\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w ye have spoken\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the ear\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w closets\+w* \+w shall be proclaimed\+w* \+w upon\+w* \+w the housetops\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w friends\+w*, \+w Be\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w afraid\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them that kill\+w* \+w the body\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w they can do\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w I will forewarn\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w whom\+w* \+w ye shall fear\+w*: \+w Fear\+w* him, \+w which\+w* \+w after\+w* \+w he hath killed\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w power\+w* \+w to cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w hell\+w*; \+w yea\+w*, \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Fear\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w Are\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w sparrows\+w* \+w sold\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w farthings\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w forgotten\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w God\+w*?

\+w But\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w the\+w* very \+w hairs\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w head\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w numbered\+w*. \+w Fear\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w therefore\+w*: \+w ye are of more value\+w* \+w than\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w sparrows\+w*.

\+w Also\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall confess\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w men\+w*, \+w him\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w confess\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the angels\+w* \+w of God\+w*:
\+w But\+w* \+w he that denieth\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w shall be denied\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the angels\+w* \+w of God\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall speak\+w* \+w a word\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w*, \+w it shall be forgiven\+w* \+w him\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w unto him that blasphemeth\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the Holy\+w* \+w Ghost\+w* \+w it shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be forgiven\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w they bring\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the synagogues\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add unto\+add* \+w magistrates\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w powers\+w*, \+w take ye\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thought\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w what thing\+w* \+w ye shall answer\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall say\+w*:
\+w For\+w* \+w the Holy\+w* \+w Ghost\+w* \+w shall teach\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the same\+w* \+w hour\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye ought\+w* \+w to say\+w*.
¶ And one of the company said unto him, Master, speak to my brother, that he divide the inheritance with me.
And he said unto him, \+w Man\+w*, \+w who\+w* \+w made\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w a judge\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w a divider\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w you\+w*?

And he said unto them, \+w Take heed\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w beware\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w covetousness\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w a man’s\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w consisteth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the abundance\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the things which\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w possesseth\+w*.
And he spake a parable unto them, saying, \+w The ground\+w* \+w of a certain\+w* \+w rich\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w brought forth plentifully\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w he thought\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w himself\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w What\+w* \+w shall I do\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w room where\+w* \+w to bestow\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w fruits\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w*, \+w This\+w* \+w will I do\+w*: \+w I will pull down\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w barns\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w build\+w* \+w greater\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w there\+w* \+w will I bestow\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w fruits\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w goods\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I will say\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w soul\+w*, \+w Soul\+w*, \+w thou hast\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w goods\+w* \+w laid up\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w years\+w*; \+w take thine ease\+w*, \+w eat\+w*, \+w drink\+w*, \+add and\+add* \+w be merry\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+add Thou\+add* \+w fool\+w*, \+w this\+w* \+w night\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w soul\+w* \+w shall be required\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w then\+w* \+w whose\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w those things\+w* \+w be\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w thou hast provided\+w*?
\+w So\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w he that layeth up treasure\+w* \+w for himself\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w rich\+w* \+w toward\+w* \+w God\+w*.

¶ And he said unto his disciples, \+w Therefore\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Take\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thought\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w life\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall eat\+w*; \+w neither\+w* \+w for the body\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall put on\+w*.
\+w The life\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w than meat\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the body\+w* \+add is more\+add* \+w than raiment\+w*.

\+w Consider\+w* \+w the ravens\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w sow\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w reap\+w*; \+w which\+w* \+w neither\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w storehouse\+w* \+w nor\+w* \+w barn\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w feedeth\+w* \+w them\+w*: \+w how much\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w better\+w* \+w than the fowls\+w*?
\+w And\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w with taking thought\+w* \+w can\+w* \+w add\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w stature\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w cubit\+w*?
\+w If\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w be not\+w* \+w able to do\+w* \+w that thing which is least\+w*, \+w why\+w* \+w take ye thought\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the rest\+w*?

\+w Consider\+w* \+w the lilies\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w they grow\+w*: \+w they toil\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w they spin\+w* \+w not\+w*; \+w and yet\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w Solomon\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w glory\+w* \+w was\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w arrayed\+w* \+w like\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of these\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w clothe\+w* \+w the grass\+w*, \+w which is\+w* \+w to day\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the field\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to morrow\+w* \+w is cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the oven\+w*; \+w how much\+w* \+w more\+w* \+add will he clothe\+add* \+w you\+w*, \+w O ye of little faith\+w*?
\+w And\+w* \+w seek\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall eat\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye shall drink\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w be ye of doubtful mind\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w the nations\+w* \+w of the world\+w* \+w seek after\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w ye have need\+w* \+w of these things\+w*.
¶ \+w But rather\+w* \+w seek ye\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w these things\+w* \+w shall be added\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.
\+w Fear\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w little\+w* \+w flock\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father’s\+w* \+w good pleasure\+w* \+w to give\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w*.

\+w Sell\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w have\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w give\+w* \+w alms\+w*; \+w provide\+w* \+w yourselves\+w* \+w bags\+w* \+w which wax\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w old\+w*, \+w a treasure\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the heavens\+w* \+w that faileth not\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w thief\+w* \+w approacheth\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w moth\+w* \+w corrupteth\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w treasure\+w* \+w is\+w*, \+w there\+w* \+w will\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heart\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w also\+w*.
\+w Let\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w loins\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w girded about\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add your\+add* \+w lights\+w* \+w burning\+w*;

\+w And\+w* \+w ye yourselves\+w* \+w like\+w* \+w unto men\+w* \+w that wait\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lord\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w he will return\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the wedding\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w when he cometh\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w knocketh\+w*, \+w they may open\+w* \+w unto him\+w* \+w immediately\+w*.

\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w those\+w* \+w servants\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w the lord\+w* \+w when he cometh\+w* \+w shall find\+w* \+w watching\+w*: \+w verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he shall gird himself\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w make\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w to sit down to meat\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will come forth\+w* \+w and serve\+w* \+w them\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he shall come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w second\+w* \+w watch\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w third\+w* \+w watch\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w find\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w so\+w*, \+w blessed\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w those\+w* \+w servants\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w know\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w the goodman of the house\+w* \+w had known\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w hour\+w* \+w the thief\+w* \+w would come\+w*, \+w he would have watched\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w have suffered\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w to be broken through\+w*.
\+w Be\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w ready\+w* \+w also\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w at an hour\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w ye think\+w* \+w not\+w*.
¶ Then Peter said unto him, Lord, speakest thou this parable unto us, or even to all?

And the Lord said, \+w Who\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w wise\+w* \+w steward\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+add his\+add* \+w lord\+w* \+w shall make ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w household\+w*, \+w to give\+w* \+add them their\+add* \+w portion of meat\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w due season\+w*?
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w when he cometh\+w* \+w shall find\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w doing\+w*.
\+w Of a truth\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he will make\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w ruler\+w* \+w over\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w hath\+w*.

\+w But and\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w heart\+w*, \+w My\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w delayeth\+w* \+w his coming\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w shall begin\+w* \+w to beat\+w* \+w the menservants\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w maidens\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to eat\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w drink\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to be drunken\+w*;

\+w The lord\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w will come\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w a day\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w he looketh\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w for\+w* \+add him\+add*, \+w and\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w an hour\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w he is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w aware\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will cut\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w in sunder\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will appoint him\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w portion\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the unbelievers\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w which knew\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord’s\+w* \+w will\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w prepared\+w* \+w not\+w* \+add himself\+add*, \+w neither\+w* \+w did\+w* \+w according to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w will\+w*, \+w shall be beaten\+w* \+w with many\+w* \+add stripes\+add*.

\+w But\+w* \+w he that knew\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w did commit\+w* \+w things worthy\+w* \+w of stripes\+w*, \+w shall be beaten\+w* \+w with few\+w* \+add stripes\+add*. \+w For\+w* \+w unto whomsoever\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w is given\+w*, \+w of\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w required\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w to whom\+w* \+w men have committed\+w* \+w much\+w*, \+w of him\+w* \+w they will ask\+w* \+w the more\+w*.
¶ \+w I am come\+w* \+w to send\+w* \+w fire\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the earth\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w will I\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w it be\+w* \+w already\+w* \+w kindled\+w*?
\+w But\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w a baptism\+w* \+w to be baptized with\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w am I straitened\+w* \+w till\+w* \+w it be accomplished\+w*!
\+w Suppose ye\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I am come\+w* \+w to give\+w* \+w peace\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w earth\+w*? \+w I tell\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w Nay\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w rather\+w* \+w division\+w*:

\+w For\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w henceforth\+w* \+w there shall be\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w divided\+w*, \+w three\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w two\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w three\+w*.

\+w The father\+w* \+w shall be divided\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the son\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the son\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the father\+w*; \+w the mother\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the daughter\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the daughter\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w the mother\+w*; \+w the mother in law\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w daughter in law\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the daughter in law\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w mother in law\+w*.

¶ And he said also to the people, \+w When\+w* \+w ye see\+w* \+w a cloud\+w* \+w rise\+w* \+w out\+w* \+w of the west\+w*, \+w straightway\+w* \+w ye say\+w*, \+w There cometh\+w* \+w a shower\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w it is\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w when\+w* \+add ye see\+add* \+w the south wind\+w* \+w blow\+w*, \+w ye say\+w*, \+w There will be\+w* \+w heat\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w it cometh to pass\+w*.

\+add Ye\+add* \+w hypocrites\+w*, \+w ye can\+w* \+w discern\+w* \+w the face\+w* \+w of the sky\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w of the earth\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w how is it that\+w* \+w ye do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w discern\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w time\+w*?
Yea, \+w and\+w* \+w why\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w yourselves\+w* \+w judge ye\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w what is right\+w*?

¶ \+w When\+w* \+w thou goest\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w adversary\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w the magistrate\+w*, \+add as thou art\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w the way\+w*, \+w give\+w* \+w diligence\+w* \+w that thou mayest be delivered\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w him\+w*; \+w lest\+w* \+w he hale\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w the judge\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the judge\+w* \+w deliver\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to the officer\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the officer\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w prison\+w*.
\+w I tell\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w depart\+w* \+w thence\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w thou hast paid\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w very\+w* \+w last\+w* \+w mite\+w*.
